final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand identity showcase for "染秋 (RAN QIU)" autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: brand identity guideline poster
Composition: 
Subject: primary color + secondary color + typography specifications for 染秋 fragrance brand
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: autumn tones (inspired by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, amber)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 染秋 (RAN QIU), 桂花乌龙, 琥珀枫叶, 柿霜暮色
Constraints: must display primary color swatch, secondary color swatch, and typography specifications in one cohesive layout
Avoid:
